'''Fogg Alait''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Grannan]] captive of the [[Yevetha]] from [[Polneye]]. He, along with all the other captives of the Yevetha, escaped due to the help of the [[Fallanassi/Legends|Fallanassi]] [[Enara]] and the ''[[Star Morning]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
